target_event: Smoke test public transit fare hearing
text: Riders said the proposed fare increase would make daily commuting less affordable.

metadata.opinion: The proposed fare increase would make daily commuting less affordable.
metadata.rationale: The evidence directly states riders' affordability concern.

target_event: Smoke test public transit fare hearing
text: The transit agency said the fare proposal was needed to preserve service frequency.

metadata.opinion: The fare proposal is needed to preserve service frequency.
metadata.rationale: The agency justifies the proposal as service preservation.
